hero.tagline: A compact SUV-style hatch with a high stance, broad powertrain choice and strong safety story.

overview.minides: Small in size, big on confidence — the Punch delivers SUV styling, practicality, and 5-star safety.
overview.description: The Tata Punch is a compact micro-SUV that blends SUV styling, city-friendly dimensions, and strong safety credentials. Available with petrol and CNG powertrains, manual and AMT gearboxes, it stands out with its bold design, 5-star safety rating, high ground clearance, and practical everyday usability.

suspension.front: Independent, lower wishbone, McPherson strut with coil spring
suspension.rear: Semi-independent twist beam with coil spring and shock absorber

variants.name: Smart CNG MT
